name: Twitch Live Sidebar
description: See which Twitch channels you follow are live — right from your browser sidebar. Quick, lightweight, and always one click away.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; connect-src https://api.twitch.tv https://id.twitch.tv https://twitch-auth-worker.thelouisxd.workers.dev; img-src 'self' https://static-cdn.jtvnw.net
